title: sunerchomai #4905
definition:
1) to come together
    1a) to assemble
    1b) of conjugal cohabitation
 2) to go (depart) or come with one, to accompany one
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to come together
    1a) to assemble
    1b) of conjugal cohabitation
 2) to go (depart) or come with one, to accompany one

    NASB:  to come together, by ext. to accompany:
